_meta.description: Manual skip rules for intra-system value pairs whose definitions are too similar to support robust conflict case generation.
_meta.review_method: Manual review, one value system at a time

nfcc1993.reason: Both center on reducing disorder and uncertainty.
Both directly target aversion to ambiguity and uncertainty.
The broad closure construct substantially overlaps with predictability-seeking.
Both are near-duplicate expressions of wanting definite answers over ambiguity.

lto.reason: Planning is too close to the future-oriented definition of long-term orientation.
